# Separator

Styled separator component built on the zw-separator primitive.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/separator</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/separator
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Separator } from '@zeus-web/separator/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/separator/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type                                                         | Default      | Description         |
| ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------ | ------------------- |
| `orientation` | `SeparatorOrientation`<br />Values: `horizontal`, `vertical` | `horizontal` | Visual orientation. |

## Events

No public events documented.

## Slots

No slots documented.

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-border`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=separator-root]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `separator` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/separator`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add separator`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Separator to divide sections.

Do not:

- Do not use Separator for decorative spacing.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'

export function Example() {
  return <Separator />
}
```
